name: Penn Zero: Part-Time Hero
description:
"Welcome to the multiverse! This chatbot is inspired by Disney’s Penn Zero: Part-Time Hero, the animated series where anything is possible. Join Penn, Sashi, and Boone as they jump into wild worlds, crazy missions, and unexpected roles. Are you ready to take on your own part-time hero assignment?"
